title: April 27
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|April|hide31=yes}}

'''April 27''' is the 117th day of the year (118th in leap years), with 248 days remaining.
</noinclude>
*[[1910s#1912|1912]] – [[Francis Batsoni]] is born.
*[[1930s#1934|1934]] – [[David Davies]] is born.
*[[1950s#1954|1954]] – [[John Cygan]] is born.
*[[1960s#1964|1964]] – [[Rob Coleman]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Sally Hawkins]] is born.
*[[1981]] – ''[[Star Wars (radio)|Star Wars]]:'' "[[Rogues, Rebels and Robots]]" aired on [[National Public Radio]].
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 97|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 97]] published.
*[[1993]] – ''[[George Lucas' Super Live Adventure]]'' premieres in Japan.
*[[2002]] – [[George Alec Effinger]] dies.
*[[2004]] – [[Star Wars Insider 76|''Star Wars Insider'' 76]] is released for subscribers.
*[[2005]] – [[General Grievous 2|''General Grievous'' 2]] published.
*2005 – [[Empire 30|''Empire'' 30]] published.
*2005 – [[Star Wars: Empire: Volume Four: The Heart of the Rebellion|''Empire: Volume Four: The Heart of the Rebellion'']] published.
*2005 – [[Republic 75|''Republic'' 75]] published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[Lost Tribe of the Sith: Savior]]'' released.
*2010 – ''[[Rebel Force: Uprising]]'' published.
*2010 – [[Star Wars Insider 117|''Star Wars Insider'' 117]] published.
*2010 – [[Kyriana Kratter]] is born.
*[[2011]] – [[Darth Vader and the Lost Command 4|''Darth Vader and the Lost Command'' 4]] published.
*2011 – [[Legacy—War 5|''Legacy—War'' 5]] published.
*2011 – [[Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection 63|''The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection 63'']] released.
*2011 – [[Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection 64|''The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection 64'']] released.
*[[2016]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 18|''Star Wars'' (2015) 18]] published.
*2016 – "[[Rey Strikes Back]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2021]] – ''[[The Art of Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[Thrawn Ascendancy: Greater Good]]'' published.
*2021 – [[Thrawn Ascendancy: Greater Good (audiobook)|''Thrawn Ascendancy: Greater Good'' audiobook]] published.
*2021 – ''[[Thrawn Ascendancy: Chaos Rising]]'' published in paperback.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Character Encyclopedia - Join the Battle!]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars: The Tiny Book of Sith]]'' published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars Insider 202|''Star Wars Insider'' 202]] published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars Crochet]]'' published.
*2021 – "[[Star Wars Inside Intel: The Creation of the Clone Army|''Star Wars'' Inside Intel: The Creation of the Clone Army]]" published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2022]] – [[Crimson Reign 4|''Crimson Reign'' 4]] published.
*2022 – [[David Birney]] dies.
*[[2023]] – ''[[Star Wars: Timelines]]'' published in the UK.
*[[2025]] – "[[Journey to the Bracca Badlands / The Search for the Missing Dunnels]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
